heading: Thirty years or more: regular commissioned officers
label: 9318 Thirty years or more: regular commissioned officers
text: A regular commissioned officer of the Air Force or the Space Force who has at least 30 years of service computed under may be retired upon his request, in the discretion of the President.section 9326 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)891810:943.R.S. 1243; (as applicable to R.S. 1243), .Dec. 16, 1930, ch. 14, § 146 Stat. 1028The word “commissioned” is inserted, since the retirement of warrant officers for length of service is covered by . The word “regular” is inserted, since 10:943 is applicable historically only to officers of a regular component. The words “and placed on the retired list” are omitted as surplusage. The words “computed under ” are inserted for clarity.section 1293 of this titlesection 8926 of this title
Prior ProvisionsA prior section 9319 was renumbered .section 9419 of this title

Amendments2021— inserted “or the Space Force” after “Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section and substituted “section 9326” for “section 8926”.Pub. L. 115–232section 8918 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

Delegation of FunctionsFunctions of President under this section to approve request of a regular commissioned officer of Air Force to retire after at least 30 years of service delegated to Secretary of Defense to perform, without approval, ratification, or other action by President, and with authority for Secretary to redelegate, see Ex. Ord. No. 12396, §§ 1(f), 3, , 47 F.R. 55897, 55898, set out as a note under , The President.Dec. 9, 1982section 301 of Title 3
